title: Largest Multiple of Three
hints: Notice that a number is divisible by 3 if and only if the sum of its digits is divisible by 3.
Sort the digits in descending order to maximize value, then remove the smallest digits needed to fix the remainder modulo 3.
If the sum mod 3 is 1, remove one digit with remainder 1, or two digits with remainder 2. Handle remainder 2 similarly.
